title: Corazon's Final Protection
description: Pages 4–8 focus on corazon's final protection, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Corazon, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Marines as corazon gives Law his life, his name, and a future, while Doflamingo's cruelty defines Law's reason to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: DonquiJote Family X Corazon, Expected Readezovous Point, Swallow Island

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: The fight for the ope ope no mi begins!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are Doflamingo and his crew even coming!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that damn sangoku... where the hell did he even get the intel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're getting comms from the scout ship near Minion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hiding place of the pirate barrels, minion island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We are currently headed to confirm this information!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: you guys sure are dumb. If they see you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The trade will be called off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Investigate the coast as quickly as possible and if you see anyone suspicious, report them immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Stop worrying about my bloody wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Get back the damn ope ope no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: That thing is worth so billion berries!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Look! The ope ope no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: That building's burning... I heard gun- shots...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I thought... HAA- something might have happened...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Oi! Now ain't the time for small talk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Be happy! This is the devil fruit that's gonna save your life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But just by eating that... is my illness going to be healed?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: What are you talking about!? Of course it'll be healed! Eat it! Go on, scarf it down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Now, go like this and bite it!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Wait, Cora-san! Becoming a devil fruit user all of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: you... you should now be able heal that illness on your own.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've beaten Doflamingo to the punch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: But... just this... this ain't gonna be enough to stop dofy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: My bad, but... I have one last thing to ask of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, Cora- San? Are you tired?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: You're covered in blood! Cora-san! Did you get shot!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Agh....things didn't go as smoothly as planned...

summary: Corazon's Final Protection advances the Dressrosa story through Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Corazon, Luffy, Unknown person #2, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
